task_description: Search for accommodation in London, open a specific hotel, review its facility photos, and proceed to check room availability and prices.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a large white rounded search input field with faint placeholder text in Chinese for entering a city, area, or hotel name, and the semitransparent red X is centered on this text box. In the full screen, this is the Agoda homepage or error landing page with a large mountain lake background, a central booking panel containing destination, date, and guest fields, and a blue search button to the right. The target is a UI control in the main content area.
caption.action: Click the destination search text box in the booking panel.
caption.expectation: The destination field should become active, placing a text cursor in it and preparing it for text entry or showing search suggestions.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in area shows the active white rounded destination search field with a magnifying glass icon on the left and the typed text "londo" visible inside, indicating text is being entered into the destination box rather than selecting a suggestion. Directly below, a dropdown list of destination suggestions is open, with star icons on the left, place names in Chinese, and hotel counts on the right; one row is highlighted in blue. In the full screen, this is an Agoda page with a dark mountain-and-lake background, a centered booking panel containing the destination field, two date fields, a guest/room selector, and a blue search button on the right.
caption.action: Type "LONDON" into the active destination search field, continuing/replacing the current partial entry so the field contains the city name.
caption.expectation: The destination text should update to London, and the suggestion list should refresh to show matching destinations related to London.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a wide blue-highlighted row in the destination suggestions dropdown, with the semitransparent red X centered on that row. On the left edge of the row is part of a rounded yellow tag, and the row corresponds to a destination suggestion item rather than an empty area. In the full screen, this is the Agoda booking panel over a mountain-lake background. The destination field contains "london", and a dropdown list of matching places is open below it. The blue-highlighted suggestion row reads "倫敦, 英國" with a small yellow badge and a gray sublabel indicating it is a city.
caption.action: Click the highlighted destination suggestion for "倫敦, 英國" in the dropdown list.
caption.expectation: That destination suggestion should be selected, the dropdown should close, and the destination field should update to the chosen London, United Kingdom location.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a date cell in the calendar popup with the number 11 inside a blue circular highlight, and the semitransparent red X is centered directly over that day. Adjacent dates 10 and 12 are visible, with 10 also highlighted, indicating a date-range selection interface. In the full screen, a two-month Agoda calendar dropdown is open beneath the booking panel on top of the mountain-lake background page. The destination field contains London in Chinese, the left date field is active, and the visible calendars are for April 2026 and May 2026.
caption.action: Click the date cell labeled 11 in the calendar popup.
caption.expectation: That date should be selected as part of the stay dates, updating the highlighted date range and possibly filling the date field or advancing focus to the next booking field.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a date cell in the open calendar popup with the number 13 inside a solid blue square/rounded selection highlight, and the semitransparent red X is centered directly on that date cell. Nearby dates 14, 20, 21, and 22 are visible, confirming this is a clickable day cell in the calendar grid rather than a blank area. In the full-screen view, the Agoda booking panel is open over a mountain lake background on a page showing a large apology message. The destination field contains London in Chinese, the calendar dropdown is open for April 2026 and May 2026, and previously selected dates 11 and 12 are highlighted in blue, indicating a date-range picker.
caption.action: Click the calendar day cell labeled 13.
caption.expectation: The day should be selected in the date picker, updating the highlighted stay range or confirming the new checkout date.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a large blue rectangular button with white Chinese text reading "搜尋好價" and a semitransparent red X centered directly on it, indicating the click target is this button control. In the full-screen view, this button is at the right end of the Agoda booking bar over a mountain lake background on a 404 page. The destination is set to London in Chinese, dates are filled, and the guest/room dropdown is still open below the occupancy field showing options like solo traveler and two travelers.
caption.action: Click the blue "搜尋好價" search button.
caption.expectation: The booking search should be submitted, likely closing the guest dropdown and navigating to Agoda search results or refreshing the page with matching stays.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a hotel result card title with bold dark text reading "Belvilla Ilford Station Hotel, 4 min from Elizabeth line," and a semitransparent red X centered directly on that title text, indicating the click target is this hotel listing entry on the page. In the full-screen view, Agoda search results for London are displayed, with filters on the left, a sorting dropdown above the results, and the clicked hotel card near the top of the results list alongside its photo, rating, location text, and price.
caption.action: Click the hotel listing title "Belvilla Ilford Station Hotel, 4 min from Elizabeth line."
caption.expectation: The selected hotel result should open its details page or listing page for that property.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a hotel exterior photo with a semitransparent red X centered on the building image itself, over the middle of the façade with brick trim, dormer windows, and storefronts at street level. This indicates the target is an object on the page canvas: the main property photo, not a toolbar or form control. In the full-screen view, the Agoda hotel details page for Belvilla Ilford Station Hotel is open, with a photo gallery near the top; the clicked image is the large main photo on the left side of that gallery, beside several smaller interior and reception thumbnails.
caption.action: Click the large main hotel photo in the gallery.
caption.expectation: The photo should become selected, likely opening the image gallery or photo viewer for the property.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a rounded light-gray category tab labeled "設施 (3)" with a semitransparent red X centered directly on the tab text, indicating the target is a UI control in the gallery tab bar rather than a photo. Nearby tabs include "酒店 (10)" on the left and "膳食 (2)" on the right. In the full-screen view, a hotel photo gallery modal is open over the Agoda hotel page, with multiple image thumbnails in the center and a details panel on the right. The clicked tab sits along the top of the modal among other gallery categories.
caption.action: Click the "設施 (3)" tab in the gallery.
caption.expectation: The gallery should switch to the facilities category, updating the displayed images and marking that tab as selected.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the full Agoda photo gallery modal without any red X, which indicates a scroll action rather than a click. The modal is currently on the blue-underlined "設施 (13)" tab and displays a grid of facility photos, including beige-tiled bathrooms with shower enclosures, a bathtub and sink vanity, plus several bedroom images with white bedding and wall-mounted televisions. A narrow vertical scrollbar inside the gallery is visible near the right edge of the image grid, suggesting the modal content itself is scrollable. In the full-screen view, this gallery overlay sits above the Agoda hotel page in Chrome, with a right-side panel listing facility highlights and a blue button labeled "查看空房及價格" at the bottom.
caption.action: Scroll down within the gallery modal to view more facility images lower in the list.
caption.expectation: The photo grid in the modal should move upward, revealing additional facility photos further down while the facilities tab remains selected.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a large rounded blue button with bold white Chinese text reading "查看空房及價格" and a semitransparent red X centered directly on the text, indicating the click target is this button, a UI control. In the full-screen view, a hotel photo gallery modal is open over the Agoda hotel page with the "設施 (13)" tab selected, a grid of room and bathroom photos in the center, a facilities summary panel on the right, and the same blue button positioned at the bottom-right of the modal.
caption.action: Click the blue "查看空房及價格" button at the bottom-right of the gallery modal.
caption.expectation: The gallery modal should close or the page should jump to the availability and pricing section, showing room options and rates.
